news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, Infosys, Vedanta, Varun Beverages, TVS Motor, NHPC mentioned in updates.
Content comprises brief updates, not authored analysis; no detailed news provided.
news.summary:

news.title: NHPC's board to review borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.
news.summary: NHPC's board to review borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.

news.title:
NHPC shares gain 1.5%, trading at ₹78.04 as Cabinet may discuss hydro power projects.
The proposed scheme aims to boost small hydro projects, improving clean energy and access in remote areas.
news.summary:
NHPC shares gain 1.5%, trading at ₹78.04 as Cabinet may discuss hydro power projects.
The proposed scheme aims to boost small hydro projects, improving clean energy and access in remote areas.

news.title:
NHPC Ltd declared Commercial Operation (CoD) of Unit-1 (250 MW) of Subansiri Lower HE Project.
With this, CoD of three units (750 MW) is completed; remaining units' CoD updates pending.
news.summary:
NHPC Ltd declared Commercial Operation (CoD) of Unit-1 (250 MW) of Subansiri Lower HE Project.
With this, CoD of three units (750 MW) is completed; remaining units' CoD updates pending.

news.title:
NHPC Limited has issued Rs. 2000 crore 7.29% AH Series Bonds on private placement.
The bonds, with a 15-year tenor, are unsecured, non-convertible, and taxable, listed on BSE and NSE.
news.summary:
NHPC Limited has issued Rs. 2000 crore 7.29% AH Series Bonds on private placement.
The bonds, with a 15-year tenor, are unsecured, non-convertible, and taxable, listed on BSE and NSE.

news.title:
NHPC accepts bids worth ₹20B for STRPP bonds with 6-15 year maturities.
The bonds are separately transferable and redeemable, as per three bankers.
news.summary:
NHPC accepts bids worth ₹20B for STRPP bonds with 6-15 year maturities.
The bonds are separately transferable and redeemable, as per three bankers.

news.title: NHPC reveals Arbitral Tribunal's ruling favoring HCC in Kishanganga HE Project case.
news.summary: NHPC reveals Arbitral Tribunal's ruling favoring HCC in Kishanganga HE Project case.

news.title:
Arbitral tribunal favored HCC with ₹227.8 Cr foreign currency claim; NHPC's counterclaim at ₹738.7 Cr.
Case pertains to Kishanganga hydroelectric project dispute; counterclaim arguments yet to initiate.
news.summary:
Arbitral tribunal favored HCC with ₹227.8 Cr foreign currency claim; NHPC's counterclaim at ₹738.7 Cr.
Case pertains to Kishanganga hydroelectric project dispute; counterclaim arguments yet to initiate.

news.title:
NHPC initiates silt management plan as Salal reservoir's capacity drops 96% due to siltation.
The capacity loss follows decades of inoperable sediment management under the Indus Waters Treaty.
news.summary:
NHPC initiates silt management plan as Salal reservoir's capacity drops 96% due to siltation.
The capacity loss follows decades of inoperable sediment management under the Indus Waters Treaty.

news.title:
NHPC board approves Rs 5,703-cr hydropower projects in J&K.
Investments depend on implementation agreement with J&K govt and approvals.
news.summary:
NHPC board approves Rs 5,703-cr hydropower projects in J&K.
Investments depend on implementation agreement with J&K govt and approvals.

news.title:
NHPC board approved two hydropower projects: Uri I Stage II (240 MW) and Dulhasti Stage II (260 MW).
Uri I costs ₹2,708.95 crore, Dulhasti costs ₹2,993.96 crore; projects start 01 March 2026 pending approvals.
news.summary:
NHPC board approved two hydropower projects: Uri I Stage II (240 MW) and Dulhasti Stage II (260 MW).
Uri I costs ₹2,708.95 crore, Dulhasti costs ₹2,993.96 crore; projects start 01 March 2026 pending approvals.

news.title:
NHPC's Q3 FY26 earnings call highlighted a 15% increase in power generation and a revenue growth of 10% YoY, reaching Rs. 8,800 crore.
Major updates include commissioning of Subansiri Lower units, 300 MW solar project in Bikaner, and progress on key hydroelectric projects like Dibang and Teesta.
news.summary:
NHPC's Q3 FY26 earnings call highlighted a 15% increase in power generation and a revenue growth of 10% YoY, reaching Rs. 8,800 crore.
Major updates include commissioning of Subansiri Lower units, 300 MW solar project in Bikaner, and progress on key hydroelectric projects like Dibang and Teesta.

news.title:
Nifty's movement hinges on IT stocks, index heavyweights Reliance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and expiry volatility.
Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.
news.summary:
Nifty's movement hinges on IT stocks, index heavyweights Reliance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and expiry volatility.
Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.

news.title: NHPC and GEDCOL propose ending their MoU and promoters' agreement for JV on floating solar projects in Odisha.
news.summary: NHPC and GEDCOL propose ending their MoU and promoters' agreement for JV on floating solar projects in Odisha.

news.title:
NHPC board approves cancellation of MoU with Green Energy Development Corporation of Odisha.
The decision was made during a meeting held on 4 February 2026.
news.summary:
NHPC board approves cancellation of MoU with Green Energy Development Corporation of Odisha.
The decision was made during a meeting held on 4 February 2026.

news.title:
NHPC reports regulatory deferral account movement of ₹11.76B net of tax.
Q3 loss before exceptions and adjustments at ₹2.8B vs profit of ₹4B YoY.
news.summary:
NHPC reports regulatory deferral account movement of ₹11.76B net of tax.
Q3 loss before exceptions and adjustments at ₹2.8B vs profit of ₹4B YoY.

news.title:
NHPC's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹2.1B from ₹10.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 9.6% from 44.7% YoY.
news.summary:
NHPC's Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹2.1B from ₹10.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 9.6% from 44.7% YoY.

news.title:
NHPC Ltd declares 14% interim dividend at Rs 1.40/share.
The record date for the dividend is set as 10.02.2026.
news.summary:
NHPC Ltd declares 14% interim dividend at Rs 1.40/share.
The record date for the dividend is set as 10.02.2026.

news.title:
NHPC approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials ending Dec 31, 2025.
Declared 14 interim dividend for FY25-26, canceled Odisha solar JV MoU, and withdrew from PTC India board.
news.summary:
NHPC approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials ending Dec 31, 2025.
